title: Telemedicine | Piel en Armonia
description: Remote dermatology presented as an integrated capability instead of a simple shortcut.

hero.title: A remote capability with clear fit and escalation logic.
hero.deck: This page explains when telemedicine works, what to send before the visit, and when to move to in-person review.

points: Choose video, WhatsApp, or phone depending on the case.
Share clinical context and images before the consultation.
Escalate to the clinic when evaluation or procedure requires it.
Early questions about spots, texture, or the right next route
Move to diagnostic assessment when the case is broad or uncertain.
Move to a service detail page when the procedural route is already clear.
Keep the same booking hooks and human support.

booking.title: Remote booking reuses the same engine with a V3 presentation.
booking.deck: You can jump directly into the appointment flow with the online mode preselected.
